Operations for managing company records
Returns a page of company records. Use the limit and after parameters to paginate through companies. You can also specify which properties to return using the properties parameter.

query.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.
The cursor for pagination to get the next page of results.
A comma-separated list of property names to return.

response.name: Successful response with a list of companies.

Company records store data about businesses and organizations. The companies endpoints allow you to manage this data and sync it between HubSpot and other systems, including creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting company records and managing their associations.
